title: Friend Baubles [A Christmas Mod]
description: A christmas themed mod that adds various decorative items and fun gifts to share.
body:
**Prepare for the winter holidays with vanilla-styled decorative Christmas blocks and items.**
Originally created for some friends on a server, so expect minor bugs and not too much content.

### Features:
- **Baubles**: Colored ornaments that can be placed anywhere.
- **Christmas lights**: Comes in four styles. (Red, green, white, and mixed)
- **Gift Boxes**: Functional gift boxes that can store items when placed.
- **Stockings**: Colored and dyable stockings to hang over your fireplace.
- **Garlands and Wreaths**: Decorative garlands and wreaths.
- **Cookies and Pudding**: Craftable treats, the pudding can be placed and eaten.
- **Santa**: Villagers who work at a Workbench will unlock the new Santa profession, they'll sell most of the items and decorations from the mod.
- **Firepoker**: Basic weapon which can set mobs on fire for a brief moment. Deals more damage if you are on fire.

This isn't a comprehensive list and there are more items and decorative blocks that you can craft or buy in the mod.
